usage.en: Complete medium for NCI-H660 neuroendocrine prostate cancer cell line per ATCC recommendation.
usage.zh: NCI-H660 神经内分泌前列腺癌细胞系完全培养基（ATCC 推荐配方）。

storage.notes: Store at 4°C protected from light. Pre-warm to 37°C before use.

components.name: Hydrocortisone (from 10 mM stock)
components.note: Serial dilute 1,000,000×: 1 µL → 1000 µL medium, then 500 µL → bottle

components.name: β-estradiol (from 50 mM stock)
components.note: Serial dilute 5,000,000×: 1 µL → 1000 µL medium, then 100 µL → bottle. Vortex stock to dissolve precipitates.

components.name: L-glutamine (200 mM stock)
components.note: Thaw at 37°C, vortex to dissolve precipitates

prepSteps.step: Add 5 mL ITS-G to 500 mL RPMI-1640 bottle.
Prepare hydrocortisone: serial dilute 10 mM stock 1,000,000× (1 µL into 1000 µL medium, then add 500 µL to bottle). Stock is fluid at -80°C — keep on ice.
Prepare β-estradiol: vortex 50 mM stock to dissolve precipitates. Serial dilute 5,000,000× (1 µL into 1000 µL medium, then add 100 µL to bottle).
Thaw L-glutamine at 37°C water bath, vortex to dissolve precipitates. Add 5 mL to bottle.
Mix gently by inversion. Store at 4°C.

notes.en: Method 2 (alternative to ITS-G): use separate Insulin (0.005 mg/mL from 10 mg/mL stock, 250 µL per 500 mL), Transferrin (0.01 mg/mL from 2.2 mg/mL stock, 2.27 mL per 500 mL), and Sodium selenite (30 nM from 5 mg/mL stock, serial dilute 963,000×). Hydrocortisone and β-estradiol stocks are fluid even at -80°C. Useful calculator: selleckchem.com/molaritycalculator.jsp
notes.zh: 方法2（替代 ITS-G）：分别加 Insulin (0.005 mg/mL)、Transferrin (0.01 mg/mL)、Sodium selenite (30 nM)。氢化可的松和雌二醇母液在 -80°C 仍为液态。
